opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My leg is completely bent the wrong way, and the pain is so bad I think I'm going to pass out.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Severe leg deformity and pain after a fall down stairs, with a wound over the injury.

symptom_narrative.onset: fell down 4 stairs about 30 minutes ago
symptom_narrative.character: excruciating, localized bony pain with an obvious bend in the leg
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: heard a crack on impact, can't bear weight or move the ankle, parent noticed a small bleeding wound over the bend in the leg
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: lying on the floor at the bottom of the stairs, completely unable to move

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: terrified, wants pain relief and reassurance

access_barriers.transport: parent present but patient cannot be moved safely without professional splinting
